2a:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.letta.com","children":"Letta"}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"One Command"}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Via AgentFile (recommended)"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Export your agent's memory from Letta as an ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," file, then import it offline:"]}]
b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# In Letta: export your agent\nletta agent export --agent-id abc123 --output my-agent.af\n\n# Then import into Mnemosyne\nhermes mnemosyne import --from letta --agent-file-path ./my-agent.af\n"}]}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Via API"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from letta --api-key sk-xxx --agent-id abc123\n"}]}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Imported"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Letta stores memories in a hierarchical model. The importer converts each layer:"}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Memory Blocks"}]," (core/working memory) → Mnemosyne working memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Archival Memory"}]," (long-term vector storage) → episodic memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"letta_archival\""}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Message History"}]," → episodic memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"letta_message\""}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent Config & Tools"}]," → metadata entries"]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Options"}]
12:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Offline AgentFile import (no API key needed)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from letta --agent-file-path ./agent.af\n\n# Specific agent via API\nhermes mnemosyne import --from letta --api-key sk-xxx --agent-id agent-123\n\n# Self-hosted Letta\nhermes mnemosyne import --from letta --api-key sk-xxx --base-url http://localhost:8283\n\n# Dry run\nhermes mnemosyne import --from letta --agent-file-path ./agent.af --dry-run\n"}]}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Extraction Methods"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"The Letta importer tries three methods in order:"}]
15:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Offline AgentFile"}]," — Parses a local ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," file. No API key or network needed."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python SDK"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install letta-client"}],") — Uses ",["$","code",null,{"children":"client.agents.export_file(agent_id)"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"REST API"}]," — Fetches memory blocks and archival search via HTTP."]}],"\n"]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["If you have the ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," file locally, method 1 is the simplest."]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"SDK Dependencies"}]
18:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install letta-client\n"}]}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":["Or use offline ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," file import with no dependencies."]}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Mapping"}]
1b:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta Source"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Field"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Memory block ",["$","code",null,{"children":"label"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Memory block ",["$","code",null,{"children":"value"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," (or metadata if label exists)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"agent.name"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Archival memory text"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"letta_archival\""}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Message ",["$","code",null,{"children":"role"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"letta_message\""}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Preserved in metadata"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Memory block ",["$","code",null,{"children":"limit"}]," / settings"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Preserved in metadata"}]]}]]}]]}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Import"}]
1d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.importers import LettaImporter\n\nmnemosyne = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"migration\")\n\n# Offline .af file\nimporter = LettaImporter(agent_file_path=\"./my-agent.af\")\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne)\n\n# Via API\nimporter = LettaImporter(api_key=\"sk-xxx\", agent_id=\"agent-123\")\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne, dry_run=True)\n\nprint(f\"Imported {result.imported} of {result.total}\")\n"}]}]
